detectors.description:
Dogeazon._getTValues(uint256) (Dogeazon.sol#1317-1343) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- tFee = tAmount.div(100).mul(2) (Dogeazon.sol#1327)
detectors.markdown:
[Dogeazon._getTValues(uint256)](Dogeazon.sol#L1317-L1343) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:

detectors.description:
Dogeazon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Dogeazon.sol#1203-1231) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(cooldown[recipient] < block.timestamp) (Dogeazon.sol#1211)
detectors.markdown:
[Dogeazon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Dogeazon.sol#L1203-L1231) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [require(bool)(cooldown[recipient] < block.timestamp)](Dogeazon.sol#L1211)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (Dogeazon.sol#15)

detectors.description: Constant Dogeazon._tTotal (Dogeazon.sol#891) is not in UPPER_CASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES
Function IUniswapV2Router01.WETH() (Dogeazon.sol#847) is not in mixedCase

	- _tTotal >= 30000000 * (10 ** 6) * (10 ** 18) (Dogeazon.sol#1323)

detectors.description: Loop condition i < _excluded.length (Dogeazon.sol#1379) should use cached array length instead of referencing `length` member of the storage array.
